status: Dossier 5-screen + iPad 3-column layout complete — build green
completed_this_session: DossierMessageBubble: added onTap callback + grounding stamp overlay (GROUNDED/PARTIAL/UNGROUNDED) on assistant bubbles

DossierKBCard: added optional subtitle param (first 3 doc titles, joined by ' · ')
DossierKBListView: added cabinetSummaryBar (DOCS/CHUNKS/KBS totals on DT.cream); loadCounts() populates subtitles + totals via bookTitles()

DossierArchView: full rewrite as DossierArchiveView — date-grouped sessions (TODAY/YESTERDAY/MMM D), #NNNN index, border-only grounding stamp, italic query preview in curly quotes, KB scope label, N CITED count, REOPEN → button; EnrichedSession private struct

DossierSourcesPanel: new file — right panel for iPad; SOURCES · N ATTACHED header; source cards with SRC·[N] ribbon chip + left-border; retrieval trace EMBED→BM25→COS-SIM→RRF-FUSE→THRESHOLD; empty state TAP A MEMO

DossierRootView: rebuilt iPad branch as DossierIPadLayout — true 3-column HStack (LEFT 240pt manilaDeep sidebar with brand + tab nav + KB list | MIDDLE flex content | RIGHT 340pt DossierSourcesPanel); tap-to-select wired via onMessageTap

Build: green on iPad Pro 13-inch (M4) simulator (id=69682D2A-65AD-43B6-B709-25B5DB2B03C8)

key_facts.archive_note: xcodebuild archive from terminal fails with errSecInternalComponent (keychain locked) — use Xcode GUI: Product > Destination > Any iOS Device (arm64), then Product > Archive
key_facts.dossier_ipad_layout: DossierIPadLayout in DossierRootView — 3-column HStack: LEFT 240pt sidebar, MIDDLE flex, RIGHT 340pt DossierSourcesPanel; tap assistant bubble → populates sources panel
key_facts.dossier_grounding: GROUNDED=sources>=2 (DT.green), PARTIAL=1 (DT.amber), UNGROUNDED=0 (DT.stamp) — used in DossierMessageBubble overlay + DossierArchiveView row stamp
key_facts.dossier_sources_panel: DossierSourcesPanel(message: Message?) — registered in pbxproj via UUIDs AA0100000000001AABB001E/001F
key_facts.chat_params_note: ChatParams(modelOverride, temperature, topP, extraSystemPrompt) — all 3 LLM services accept params; auto-persisted via didSet in ChatViewModel
key_facts.arch_tab_note: DossierTab .arch is LOG tab showing DossierArchiveView (date-grouped sessions); arch stats live in DossierQueryView.retrievalCard
key_facts.h2_note: Large file guard: 250 MB limit in ingest(), PDF page cap 1000 in PDFParser, OCR page cap 200 + 100 DPI in VisionOCRParser
key_facts.h3_note: 9 new tests: PDFParserTests, IngestErrorTests, DatabaseServiceKeywordTests — all use raw GRDB DatabaseQueue (not DatabaseService singleton)
